notes: v0.16.44 — Final three BOSS RUSH mockup-B fidelity fixes. (1) DIFFICULTY pills are now a 2x2 grid (EASY/NORMAL top, HARD/BRUTAL bottom) instead of a 1x4 horizontal row. (2) LEADERBOARD rewritten flat to match the mockup: 7 rows of rank · letter grade · nickname · time, no TOP-10 chrome, no GLOBAL chip, no DATE column, no class-filter tabs. Your row keeps the cyan highlight. (3) ATTACK PATTERNS panel (renamed from TACTICS · PHASE BY PHASE): flat rows with small accent square + single-line attack description per phase, matching mockup .attacks-list. Windows only.
